name: AbuseIPDB
description: Report and investigate malicious IP addresses.

name: GreyNoise Visualizer
description: Understand whether an IP is noisy (mass scanning) or targeted.

name: Talos Intelligence
description: Cisco's IP and domain reputation lookup with threat indicators.

name: URLVoid
description: Domain reputation, blacklist status, and scoring.

name: FortiGuard Web Filter Check
description: Web filtering category lookup for Fortinet firewalls.

name: SSL Labs Test
description: Check SSL/TLS security configuration on public-facing websites.

name: VirusTotal
description: Scan files and URLs with multiple antivirus engines simultaneously.

name: Hybrid Analysis
description: Deep behavioral analysis of files and URLs in a sandbox environment.

name: Any.run
description: Real-time interactive malware sandbox for dynamic analysis.

name: ThreatFox
description: Community-driven threat intelligence and IOC database from Abuse.ch.

name: PhishTank
description: Crowd-sourced phishing link database for verifying suspicious URLs.

name: Shodan
description: Search engine for exposed internet-connected devices and open ports.

name: Have I Been Pwned
description: Check if email addresses or credentials have been exposed in known data breaches.

name: MXToolbox
description: DNS, email flow, blacklist diagnostics, and MX record lookup.

name: Google Dig Tool
description: Simple web-based DNS lookup tool from Google Workspace.

name: MITRE ATT&CK
description: Adversary tactics, techniques, and procedures framework.

name: CIS Controls
description: Prescriptive best practices for cyber defense from the Center for Internet Security.

name: NIST Cybersecurity Framework
description: US NIST framework for critical infrastructure cybersecurity risk management.

name: ASD Essential Eight
description: Top eight mitigation strategies recommended by the Australian Signals Directorate.

name: ASIC Regulatory Guide 104
description: ASIC licensing guide covering general obligations including IT resource and risk management (RG 104).

name: Australian Cyber Security Centre (ACSC)
description: National guidance, news, alerts, and incident reporting from the ACSC.

name: Office of the Australian Information Commissioner (OAIC)
description: Privacy and compliance guidance under Australian law.

name: Notifiable Data Breaches (OAIC)
description: Guide and reporting site for notifiable data breaches under Australian Privacy Act.

name: Stay Smart Online Alerts
description: Current cyber threats and scam notifications from the Australian Government.

name: ISO/IEC 27001
description: Information security management systems (ISMS) standard.

name: ISO 9001
description: Quality management systems (QMS) standard.

name: Windows End-of-Life Tracker
description: Windows version lifecycle status including end-of-support dates.

name: PCI DSS
description: Cardholder data protection and compliance framework for payment processing.
